expected_effect: Fix chronological ordering disorder in narrative, improving data quality for downstream consumers (prompt assembly, evo-digest, reflection)
rationale: evolution_narrative.md had 5 entries spanning the 2026-03-15/16 date boundary that were out of chronological order, causing incorrect historical representation. The archive note for 3 retired-gene failed cycles was also at the wrong position (end of file instead of its chronological location).

preconditions: need stricter, auditable evolution protocol outputs
strategy: Extract signals and determine selection rationale via Selector JSON
Prefer reusing existing Gene/Capsule; only create if no match exists
Refactor prompt assembly to embed assets (genes, capsules, parent event)
Reduce noise and ambiguity; enforce strict output schema
Append cycle record to MEMORY.md history table (never overwrite existing entries)
Validate by running node index.js run and ensuring no runtime errors
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene definitions, create Capsule on success

summary: Fixed chronological disorder in evolution_narrative.md: reordered 5 out-of-order entries across the 2026-03-15/16 date boundary, repositioned archive note to correct chronological location, updated MEMORY.md history table and daily log.
